item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 9min 𝗝𝗼𝗻𝗻𝘆 𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘆𝘁𝗼𝗻 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗶𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗺
League leader Jonny Clayton has edged out Josh Rock i
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 9min 𝗝𝗼𝗻𝗻𝘆 𝗖𝗹𝗮𝘆𝘁𝗼𝗻 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗳𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝗶𝗻 𝗥𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗺
League leader Jonny Clayton has edged out Josh Rock in a deciding leg to reach the final for the second week running.
He'll face Luke Littler who entered the night in second place and three points Mostrar más Hecho con IA 175
